description_long: This is a smart display device with a large, landscape-oriented touchscreen framed by a slim, white bezel. The front features a vibrant display showing a digital clock, weather, and a video call interface, suggesting smart home or communication functionality. The device is supported by a conical, fabric-covered stand in a dark gray color, which houses the power cable connection at the rear. The back panel is smooth and matte, with a subtle circular logo and a small, round button near the top edge. A camera is centered above the screen, integrated into the bezel for video calls or facial recognition. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on clean lines and a stable, angled base.
description: A modern smart display with a large touchscreen, white bezel, and a conical fabric stand, featuring a front camera and rear power connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen, white bezel, centered camera above the display, and on-screen interface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled, conical fabric stand and the thin profile of the screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte back panel, subtle logo, power cable connection, and a small button near the top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the angled stand, cable exit, and the slimness of the device.
attribute_screen_presence: Yes, a large rectangular screen occupies most of the front face, centered within the bezel.
attribute_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, white, and symmetrical on all sides with rounded corners and a smooth finish.
attribute_button_placement: A single small button is visible on the rear, near the top edge of the device.
attribute_brand_logo: A subtle, small circular brand logo is visible on the rear center of the stand.
attribute_camera_location: A single camera is centered above the screen, integrated into the top bezel.
